name: congress-trading-pipeline
title: Congress Trading Pipeline
description: Fetches U.S. Senate Periodic Transaction Reports (PTRs) directly from efdsearch.senate.gov, normalizes them into a clean schema, and pushes them to a queryable dataset. Replaces QuiverQuant for congressional trading data.

input.title: Congress Trading Pipeline Input
input.description: Optional overrides for the pipeline run.

fetchDaysBack.title: Days back to fetch
fetchDaysBack.description: Rolling window of PTRs to fetch (default 90).

fromDate.title: From date (YYYY-MM-DD)
fromDate.description: Explicit start date. Overrides fetchDaysBack if set.

toDate.title: To date (YYYY-MM-DD)
toDate.description: Explicit end date. Defaults to today.

debugPtrLimit.title: Debug: limit PTR detail fetches
debugPtrLimit.description: If > 0, fetch detail HTML for only the first N PTRs. Useful for diagnostics.

includeHouse.title: Include U.S. House filings
includeHouse.description: Fetch from disclosures-clerk.house.gov (annual ZIP + per-PTR PDF parsing).
